title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to teach developers how to convert Oracle database data types (VARCHAR2, NUMBER, DATE) to PostgreSQL equivalents with full precision and internationalization support. The tutorial covers schema and code conversion while explaining the underlying migration process.
